description: A construction contractor needs to schedule a framing inspection for a new home build.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contractor and the building permit number for the property.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the active building permit.

nodes.task_description: Check the available time slots for a building inspector.
Schedule the framing inspection for the requested date and time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the inspection and provides a confirmation.
